sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70772" key="nhssotrofei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νησσοτροφεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n70772.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place where ducks are kept,</tr_> Varro <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">RR</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.11.1</biblScope></bibl>, Colum.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.15.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
